protected_action_catalog.description: Release of an outbound payment for settlement.

risk_boundary.rationale: Funds leave the controlled boundary irreversibly.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Declare the closed set of protected actuators that this profile mediates.

claim.scope_text: ProofRail evidence may inform whether a protected actuator declaration is present for payment.release.

control_limitations.summary: Catalog scope is example-only; downstream relying parties must define their own actions.

dependency_references.relationship_note: v0.3.6 catalog presumes v0.3.5 policy-pack release.
v0.3.6 crosswalk presumes v0.3.2 trace-binding profile semantics.
v0.3.6 crosswalk references v0.2.7 composed-gateway artifacts.

scope_limitations: This package is example data; it does not anchor a production reliance decision.
non_claims: v0.3.6 does not claim compliance, certification, audit approval, regulator approval, or production authorization.
v0.3.6 does not claim control design or operating effectiveness, legal enforceability, runtime truth, transferred trust, or governed reliance.
